title: Roof Plumber Cranbourne
content:
Roof Plumbing Services in Cranbourne

Searching for a qualified roof plumber in Cranbourne? Sandhurst Roofing has a team of experienced, fully certified roof plumbers who handle every part of your roof's drainage, from gutter and downpipe repairs to connecting rainwater tanks and fixing stubborn leaks. Every job is carried out by a registered, fully licensed and insured roof plumber, so you have peace of mind that the work meets Australian Standards and is done right the first time.

Cranbourne has grown quickly, with large new estates sitting alongside the older township. New homes come with COLORBOND® guttering and rainwater tanks, while the established streets often have ageing gutters that are due for replacement. We look after both.

Get a Free Quote!

Common Roof Plumbing Problems We See in Cranbourne

Because Cranbourne sits on flat, low-lying ground, drainage really matters here. The most common call-outs are gutters and downpipes that cannot move water away fast enough during heavy rain, leading to overflow against the house and pooling in the yard.

Cranbourne also sits in Melbourne's south-east hail belt, so we regularly repair gutters dented or split by hail and storms. On older township homes we see rusted eaves gutters and perished downpipes, while on newer builds the issues are usually undersized or poorly connected stormwater and tank plumbing.

Gutters, Downpipes & Fascia in Cranbourne

Your gutters, downpipes and fascia carry water away from the structure of your home, preventing leaks, rot, sagging and mould. We repair and replace all of them in durable COLORBOND® steel so they keep doing their job for years to come, even under Cranbourne's strong summer sun.

From replacing a hail-damaged run of guttering to fitting larger downpipes that cope with sudden downpours, we engineer a solution that fits your home and your budget, and we leave the site clean when we are done.

Roof Leaks, Flashings & Valley Repairs in Cranbourne

When a Cranbourne home springs a leak, the cause is often a failed flashing, a rusted valley or a downpipe that has come away rather than the roof sheets themselves. Our roof plumbers track the water back to its true source and fix it properly.

We re-seal flashings around vents, skylights and walls, clear and replace valleys, and re-point ridge capping on tiled roofs. Sorting a small leak early is far cheaper than repairing water-damaged ceilings and insulation later on.

Box Gutters & Rainwater Systems in Cranbourne

Many newer Cranbourne homes are built with rainwater tanks plumbed into the roof drainage, which is now standard on a lot of estate builds. We install, connect and repair tank systems, charged downpipes and stormwater connections so your collected water is used and drained correctly.

On larger and commercial-style buildings we also handle box gutters and rainheads, making sure they are correctly sized and have the right fall so they never overflow inside.

Storm Damage & Emergency Roof Plumbing in Cranbourne

Storms and hail are a fact of life in Cranbourne, and they take a heavy toll on gutters and downpipes. After a storm we are called out for dented and split guttering, blocked downpipes, dislodged tiles and water coming in around damaged flashings.

If your roof is leaking after a storm, give us a call. We will make it safe and watertight quickly, then walk you through the permanent repairs and help with insurance documentation where needed.

Why Cranbourne Locals Choose Sandhurst Roofing

Cranbourne locals choose Sandhurst Roofing because we are reliable, punctual and efficient, and we treat your home with respect. We are a family-owned business that is fully licensed and insured, and every roof plumber on our team is registered.

We give honest advice and a clear, competitive quote, so you always know what is happening and what it will cost before we start.

What Our Cranbourne Roof Plumbing Customers Say

The work looks first rate and all of the old gutter was removed very neatly without any drama or mess. It was a pleasure to deal with Steve who was very friendly and accommodating, plus the price was considerably cheaper than that quoted by a rival company. I'm now just waiting for it to rain!

Right from the start, I knew that your company was the right company to go with due to your professionalism, constant communication and keeping us in the loop every step of the way. We will certainly be highly recommending your company and have already done so.

Cranbourne Roof Plumbing FAQs

Are rainwater tanks required on new homes in Cranbourne?
Many new builds in the area include a rainwater tank plumbed into the roof drainage. We install and connect tank systems and make sure they meet plumbing requirements.

Can you repair hail-damaged gutters?
Yes. Hail damage is common in Cranbourne. We repair or replace dented and split guttering and can document the damage for insurance claims.

How quickly can you come out?
We aim to respond promptly, and for leaks and storm damage we prioritise getting your roof watertight as fast as we can. Call 0448 812 800 to arrange a visit.

Suburbs We Service Near Cranbourne

Beyond Cranbourne we look after roof plumbing across the south-east, including Berwick and Frankston, plus surrounding suburbs such as Clyde, Cranbourne East, Lynbrook, Lyndhurst and Pakenham. If you are looking for a roof plumber near me, we are local to you.

Get a Free Roof Plumbing Quote in Cranbourne

Call Steve on 0448 812 800, email info@sandhurstroofing.com.au, or fill out the form below for your free Cranbourne roof plumbing quote. We will explain exactly what needs doing and give you an honest, fixed price before any work starts.
